root_text.an5.102:1.1: “Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu ussaṅkitaparisaṅkito hoti pāpabhikkhūti api akuppadhammopi.
root_text.an5.102:2.2: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu vesiyāgocaro vā hoti, vidhavāgocaro vā hoti, thullakumārikāgocaro vā hoti, paṇḍakagocaro vā hoti, bhikkhunīgocaro vā hoti.
root_text.an5.102:3.1: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu ussaṅkitaparisaṅkito hoti pāpabhikkhūti api akuppadhammopī”ti.

translation_text.an5.102:1.1: “Mendicants, even if a monk is of impeccable character, he might be suspected and distrusted as a ‘bad monk’ for five reasons.
translation_text.an5.102:2.2: It’s when a monk resorts to prostitutes, widows, voluptuous girls, eunuchs, or nuns for alms.
translation_text.an5.102:3.1: Even if a monk is of impeccable character, he might be suspected and distrusted as a ‘bad monk’ for these five reasons.”

variant_text.an5.102:1.1: api akuppadhammopi → api akuppadhammo (bj, sya-all, km); api kuppadhammopi (pts1ed)
